data.body: B3 PR #24 MERGED to main (bf6b3eef) by user via admin (GitHub mergeStateStatus was stuck stale despite all gates met — diagnosed: 0 behind, all 11 required checks green on head SHA, 0 reviews required, no merge queue, no classic protection; stale eval after force-push rebases during active base movement). gates/completion-verification.yaml now on main. Deleted merged branch. Rebased B1 branch (feat/production-batch-runner) onto current main. Next: implement B1 (ProductionBatchRunner).
